page_metadata.biotools__summary: Software devoted to protein-coding sequences identification. The input is a set of DNA sequences that need not to be aligned. The method takes advantage of the specific substitution pattern of coding sequences together with the consistency of reading frames.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Software devoted to protein-coding sequences identification. The input is a set of DNA sequences that need not to be aligned. The method takes advantage of the specific substitution pattern of coding sequences together with the consistency of reading frames.
